nuggets.idea_one_liner: Repenting just to stop the pain isn't a turn toward God; it is a tactical maneuver to escape consequences.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Confronts the shallow 'foxhole prayer' spirituality that prevents deep transformation.

numerator_notes: Freedom from the cycle of relief-seeking
denominator_notes: Requires honest look at self-love vs God-love

nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: I hear the Lord say, audibly... you're only repenting so you don't have to feel the pain anymore. You're not repenting because you actually love me.
proof_anchor_lines: Only repenting to stop the pain
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: Your 'repentance' is actually keeping you stuck in the pain.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: Stop negotiating with God for comfort.
nuggets.hook_angle_3_mechanism: The shift from seeking relief to seeking the Redeemer.
nuggets.enemy_frame_proof_redacted: You're only repenting so you don't have to feel the pain anymore.
nuggets.first_step_seed: Ask God: 'Do I want You, or do I just want the weights off my chest?' Sit with the answer.
